title: elaphoglossum ornithoglossum
intro: Elaphoglossum ornithoglossum, also known as the ornithoglossum fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum ornithoglossum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and protect against oxidative stress. Elaphoglossum ornithoglossum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
